atmosphere: Ancient, Dark fantasy, Melancholic, Organic, Mysterious, Alive

rules.h1_h2: Never center unless it's a dramatic lore reveal. Left-aligned for utility. High contrast.
rules.body: Left aligned, generous line-height for readability during fast gameplay.
rules.labels: Use mono font for stats, AC, HP numbers to contrast the heavily organic serif.

layout_and_spacing.general: Generous organic spacing. Use padding scale (p-6, p-8, p-12) to let the dark void breathe. The container must feel like stepping into a cavern.

grids.dashboard_bento: Control Room style for Living Body. Strict grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6) with dense functional packing, but visual edges are soft and organic.
grids.gallery: Tetris style for Bestiary/Fungarium. Mixed spans to feel like an unkempt garden.

layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px solid rgba(168, 162, 154, 0.1). Some borders should be completely hidden, relying on ambient shadow/glow.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or slightly irregular rounded-sm to mimic bark and raw paper.

living_body_dashboard.description: Ergonomic but alive. Focuses on HP, AC, Resources.
living_body_dashboard.hp_bar: A living entity. No flat colors. A dark red to toxic green gradient that subtly pulses. When damaged, the bar 'rots' (turns dark brown/black).
living_body_dashboard.rest_buttons: Dark bark texture. On hover: emits a subtle purple spore glow. On click: 'The Network feeds. Flesh restored.' text flashes briefly.
living_body_dashboard.structure: Bento grid with high data density. Uses monospace for actual numbers.

memory_graph_nodes.description: Interactive graph of the character's memories and connections.
memory_graph_nodes.library: d3.js or react-force-graph-2d. Must be performant.
memory_graph_nodes.nodes: Glowing purple orbs (using primary_glow). Size varies by memory significance.
memory_graph_nodes.links: Curved SVG lines (stroke: mycelium_thread) that have a faint opacity pulse, simulating nutrients flowing.
memory_graph_nodes.interaction: Hovering a node illuminates its connected mycelium threads. Background is completely transparent to blend with the app void.

bestiary_card.background: surface color (#101411) with a very faint noise texture.
bestiary_card.decorations: Absolute positioned SVG mushrooms or root vectors in the top-right or bottom-left corners that 'grow' on load.
bestiary_card.typography: Creature name in Gloock. Stats in JetBrains Mono. Lore in Crimson Text.

apothecary_recipe.forbidden: Background changes to surface_forbidden (#050305). Text glows slightly red. The purple spore accent becomes a sicklier magenta.

navigation.type: Command Palette (Cmd+K) heavily prioritized for fast D&D session switching. Side navigation is a thin vertical tree-like structure.
navigation.active_state: A small glowing fungal node appears next to the active link.

motion_and_interactions.spore_particles: Global background effect. Small div/canvas particles moving slowly upwards. Opacity varies (0.1 to 0.4). They avoid the mouse cursor slightly.
motion_and_interactions.mycelium_growth: When a new section mounts, use Framer Motion to draw SVG paths (stroke-dashoffset animation) over 1.5s, simulating roots claiming the page.
motion_and_interactions.hover_spores: Cards have a radial gradient mask on hover that reveals a brighter purple glow underneath, tracking the mouse position.

images.description: Bioluminescent mushrooms glowing in a dark forest
Dark roots/mycelium texture for card backgrounds

assets.icons: lucide-react for UI interactions. Use 'Ghost', 'Skull', 'Leaf', 'BookOpen' extensively.

pdf_export.strategy: Preserve the dark theme visually, but use high resolution rendering via window.print() CSS overrides. Convert background textures to solid dark colors (#070907) to save printer ink if requested, otherwise maintain the full moody presentation for digital sharing. Ensure contrast is slightly boosted in @media print.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements (buttons, nav links, spell slots, HP inputs) must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hp-decrement-button', data-testid='nav-bestiary').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install framer-motion, lucide-react, and either d3 or react-force-graph-2d.
Implement the global Spore background as a fixed canvas or framer-motion div layer behind everything (z-[-1]).
Use standard HTML inputs styled with Tailwind for the character sheet, avoiding Shadcn generic styles.
Implement a fast Cmd+K command palette for navigation.
Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Gloock', and 'Crimson Text' are loaded via Google Fonts.
